input.command:
python3 - << 'PY'
import json
p='/home/hsenidmobile.net/dewmike.a/Documents/Projects/Deepx/_outputs/weather_task_output/weather_colombo_raw.json'
with open(p,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    s=f.read()
# if file is a quoted JSON string, strip outer quotes
if s.startswith('"') and s.endswith('"'):
    s=s[1:-1]
# unescape backslash sequences
s = s.replace('\\_','_')
# also fix escaped slashes
s = s.replace('\\/','/')
# now try to load
try:
    obj=json.loads(s)
    with open(p,'w',encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(obj,f,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)
    print('ok')
except Exception as e:
    print('fail',e)
    with open(p+'.failed','w',encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(s)
